text_original: 萃，亨。王假有廟，利見大人，亨，利貞。用大牲吉，利有攸往。
text_normalized: 萃，亨。王假有廟，利見大人，亨，利貞。用大牲吉，利有攸往。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=Judgment.

text_original: 初六：有孚不終，乃亂乃萃，若號一握為笑，勿恤，往无咎。
text_normalized: 初六：有孚不終，乃亂乃萃，若號一握為笑，勿恤，往无咎。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=first.

text_original: 六二：引吉，无咎，孚乃利用禴。
text_normalized: 六二：引吉，无咎，孚乃利用禴。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=second.

text_original: 六三：萃如，嗟如，无攸利，往无咎，小吝。
text_normalized: 六三：萃如，嗟如，无攸利，往无咎，小吝。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=third.
Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=fourth.

text_original: 九五：萃有位，无咎。匪孚，元永貞，悔亡。
text_normalized: 九五：萃有位，无咎。匪孚，元永貞，悔亡。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=fifth.
